subcodes.first_line: O self-sacrificing servant of the Beauty of Abha! Thy letter hath arrived and from its contents it became known that thou art bound for the Caucasus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جانفشان جمال ابهی نامه رسید از مضمون معلوم گردید که عازم قفقاز شدید تا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
